name_en: Overseas Original M Beige M34 Pink M Cognac M Cream M349 Black Exclusive Real Shot! Spring Collection Easy Pouch On Strap Bag made of Monogram Empreinte leather, revealing exquisite style with Monogram embossing and soft texture. Clever use of chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap, freely switching between shoulder and crossbody. Dimensions: 9×5×3cm
